scripts.dev: corepack pnpm run compile && node dist/index.js
scripts.dev:inbox-processor: corepack pnpm run compile && node dist/inbox-processor.js
scripts.dev:outbox-executor: corepack pnpm run compile && node dist/outbox-executor.js
scripts.test:integration: corepack pnpm --filter @ai-dev-team/db compile && corepack pnpm run compile && node --test --test-concurrency=1 "dist/**/*.integration.test.js"
